response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience with strong technical depth in diverse systems, including AI-agent infrastructure and open-source platform development, but lacks explicit evidence of cloud/AI product leadership at scale, strategic AI strategy influence, or formal recognition as an AI expert — key requirements for a director-level IC role.
strengths: Proven full-stack engineering versatility across languages and domains
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source AI-adjacent platforms
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, OSS, and cross-team impact
concerns: No clear evidence of cloud AI platform ownership or strategic product design at scale
Lacks documented AI-specific innovations or published research/products in AI/ML
No indication of director-level stakeholder influence or customer advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Strong technical breadth and OSS contribution
